top_signals.title: SBI Funds IPO Anchor Book Draws Capital Group, BlackRock, Goldman, GIC
top_signals.summary: The Capital Group Inc., BlackRock Inc., Fidelity Investments and Goldman Sachs Asset Management are among key investors that participated in the anchor book of SBI Funds Management Ltd. ahead the start of bidding for its initial public offering.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Test Your ETF Knowledge In Our IQ Test
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg's Joel Weber puts Scarlet Fu, Katie Greifeld, and Eric Balchunas to the test on "Bloomberg ETF IQ" in this week's edition of "IQ Test." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Strategy’s no-bitcoin-buy week shows ‘greater balance-sheet discipline,’ analysts say
top_signals.summary: Analysts from Benchmark and TD Cowen maintained Buy ratings and price targets of $570 and $260, respectively.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: OpenAI temporarily relaxes GPT-5.6 Sol usage limits
top_signals.summary: OpenAI is temporarily relaxing GPT-5.6 Sol usage after demand for the company's most powerful model surged over the past 48 hours. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
